# Requirements Analysis

## Functional Requirements

### FR-1: Todo CRUD Operations
- Create new todo items with a title
- Toggle todo completion status
- Delete existing todo items
- Display all todo items in a list

### FR-2: User Interface
- Single-page application with responsive layout
- Input form for adding new todos
- Checkbox for toggling completion
- Delete button per item

## Non-Functional Requirements
- **Performance**: Render updates < 100ms
- **Accessibility**: Keyboard-navigable, ARIA labels
- **Browser Support**: Modern evergreen browsers

## Constraints
- Client-side only (no backend persistence)
- React with TypeScript
- Vite build toolchain
